channel.title: Pork Industry News Daily
channel.description: An automated daily audio briefing of global pork industry news, generated from a curated Notion news database.
channel.itunes:author: Pork Industry News

item.title: July 24 Pork Industry News
item.description: China suspends retaliatory pork tariffs and April exports rebound 33 percent, while African swine fever flares up in Spain, Germany, and South Korea.

item.title: July 23 Pork Industry News
item.description: Tight U.S. breeding herds keep hog prices elevated even as global oversupply warnings grow, African swine fever spreads in Germany and Poland, and China, Canada, and Mexico trade issues remain in focus.

item.title: July 22 Pork Industry News
item.description: African Swine Fever at record global risk, tight U.S. hog supply lifts prices, and China deepens oversupply.
